recall.description: Rate of correct values when non-null expected

wrong_value_rate.description: Rate of incorrect non-null values when non-null expected

miss_rate.description: Rate of null outputs when non-null expected

precision.description: Rate of correct values when non-null output produced

hallucination_rate.description: Rate of non-null outputs when null expected

coverage.description: Number of listings where ground truth was non-null

value_recall.description: Rate of value appearing in actual when expected

value_hallucination_rate.description: Rate of value appearing in actual when not expected
